content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 8, 2014

Daniel Davis
1251 Surf Avenue
Pacific Grove, CA 93950

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-14-025

Dear Mr. Davis:

The purpose of this correspondence is to confirm that since we have not received word from you since our last correspondence, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

In our letter of April 8, 2014 we advised that if we did not receive the information we requested in our March 7, 2014 letter by April 18, 2014, your request would be withdrawn. Accordingly, pursuant to this correspondence, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

However, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may simply request it anew at that time.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Zackery P. Morazzini
General Counsel

[signature]

By:    Valentina Joyce
       Counsel, Legal Division

VJ:jgl

sections.question_synthetic: This is not an advice letter responding to a legal question, but rather a withdrawal notification due to the requestor's failure to provide requested information within the specified deadline.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC has withdrawn the advice request (File No. W-14-025) because the requestor did not provide information requested by the March 7, 2014 deadline of April 18, 2014, but the requestor may resubmit a new advice request in the future.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no traditional QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document clearly states withdrawal due to non-response to prior correspondence dated March 7 and April 8, 2014. Signed by Valentina Joyce, Counsel.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: This is not an advice letter responding to a legal question, but rather a withdrawal notification due to the requestor's failure to provide requested information within the specified deadline.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC has withdrawn the advice request (File No. W-14-025) because the requestor did not provide information requested by the March 7, 2014 deadline of April 18, 2014, but the requestor may resubmit a new advice request in the future.
